catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-1.explanation: Claire will meet Alex at the place shown in picture A.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-2.explanation: He should call again at eleven o'clock.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-4.explanation: The weather was sunny during the picnic.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-8.explanation: They must be able to drive.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-10.explanation: Send a letter and a photograph.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-11.explanation: His colleagues are going with him.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-12.explanation: They will stay at a university.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-15.explanation: He loves the food in Dublin.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-16.explanation: She bought it because it is fast.

catalog-listening-ket-a2-test1-q-18.explanation: The photo shows a school playground.
